memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from Burkes's Peerage & Baronetage, 1999, p. 161

Sir Richard Bagot, of Bagot's Bromley; living 1256; m. Christian, daughter of Sir William Mauveslin, of Rydeware, and d. by June 1271.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana Mauveslin於大約1233年出生時，她的父親Guillaume de Mauvoisin34歲，母親Matilda Rydeware25歲。她於大約1254年與Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christiana Mauveslin于大约1233年出生时，她的父亲Guillaume de Mauvoisin34岁，母亲Matilda Rydeware25岁。她于大约1254年与Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana Mauveslin was born about 1233, her father, Guillaume de Mauvoisin, was 34 and her mother, Matilda Rydeware, was 25. She married Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley about 1254, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana Mauveslin est née environ 1233, son père, Guillaume de Mauvoisin, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Matilda Rydeware, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley environ 1254, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles.

de.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England,: Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Christiana Mauveslin um 1233 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Mauvoisin 34 und ihre Mutter Matilda Rydeware 25. Sie hat um 1254 in England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana Mauveslin è nata il circa 1233, sua padre, Guillaume de Mauvoisin, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Matilda Rydeware, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley circa 1254, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana Mauveslinが約1233年に生まれた時，父Guillaume de Mauvoisinは34歳，母Matilda Rydewareは25歳であった。約1254年にイギリスイギリスでSir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Mauveslin(이)가 대략 1233년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Mauvoisin(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Rydeware(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1254년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana Mauveslin nasceu aproximadamente 1233, seu pai, Guillaume de Mauvoisin, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Rydeware, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley aproximadamente 1254, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas.

ro.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England,: Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana Mauveslin родилась около 1233 г., её отцу по имени Guillaume de Mauvoisin было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Rydeware, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley около 1254 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christiana Mauveslin nació aproximadamente 1233, su papá, Guillaume de Mauvoisin, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Matilda Rydeware, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley aproximadamente 1254, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas.
